productDisplayName: French Connection Men Purple & Brown Shirt
description: Purple, brown and beige check shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm buttoned tab for rolling up the sleeves, buttoned tab with loops on the shoulder, back yoke, two patch pockets on the chest with flaps and concealed buttoned closure, branding on the left patch pocket flap, insert pocket above the left patch pocket and a curved hemline
